content: Enabling {{organizationName}} AI will make {{organizationName}}-provided AI models available to all {{productName}} users.

comment.text: This text explains that enabling AI tools will make AI models provided by the organization accessible to all users of the product. It appears in a dialog or informational section related to AI tools within the services settings, likely to inform users about the benefits of enabling this feature. Translators should ensure the explanation of AI model availability is clear and accurate.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: Gender mismatch: 'IA' (Inteligência Artificial) is a feminine noun in Portuguese, so the article should be 'a' instead of 'o'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Ativar a IA do {{organizationName}} tornará os modelos de IA fornecidos pelo {{organizationName}} disponíveis para todos os usuários do {{productName}}.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: Gender mismatch: 'IA' (Inteligência Artificial) is a feminine noun in Portuguese, so the article should be 'a' instead of 'o'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Ativar a IA do {{organizationName}} tornará os modelos de IA fornecidos pelo {{organizationName}} disponíveis para todos os usuários do {{productName}}.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'Enabling' was translated as 'Omrežje' (Network), which completely changes the meaning of the sentence. The correct term should refer to 'activating' or 'enabling' a feature.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Omogočanje {{organizationName}} AI bo omogočilo dostop do modeljev AI, ki jih ponuja {{organizationName}}, vsem uporabnikom {{productName}}.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: Extra tag(s) not in English: , , , , ,
The word 'disponuesh' is a spelling error in Albanian; the correct form is 'disponueshëm'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: {{organizationName}} AI do të bëjë modelët AI të ofruar nga {{organizationName}} të disponueshëm për të gjithë përdoruesit e {{productName}}.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'Укріпавање' is Ukrainian, not Serbian. The correct Serbian word for 'Enabling' in this context should be 'Омогућавање'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Омогућавање {{organizationName}} AI ће учинити AI моделе које пружа {{organizationName}} доступним свим корисницима {{productName}}.
